# W19T1 Implementation Plan

## Task Goal

Create the `src/shape/` module skeleton so transpose support has a dedicated module entry and implementation file.

## Related Design Documents

- `design/16-shape.md` §3
- `design/16-shape.md` §7
- `design/01-architecture.md` §3
- `design/00-coding.md` §2.1, §2.5

## Dependencies

- W8T1

## Files to Create/Modify

- `src/shape/mod.rs`
- `src/shape/transpose.rs`
- `src/lib.rs`, add `pub mod shape;` only if needed

## Implementation Details

### Module layout

Create the two file module layout required by the design:

```rust
// src/shape/mod.rs
mod transpose;
```

```rust
// src/shape/transpose.rs
// transpose implementation file
```

### Scope rules

- Wave 19 only exposes transpose related functionality.
- Do not add `permute_axes`, `swap_axes`, `moveaxis`, reshape DSLs, or any other shape API.
- Keep the shape module as a pure consumer of `tensor`, `dimension`, and `layout`.

## Test Plan

- Module compile smoke test through crate build

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `src/shape/mod.rs` exists
- [ ] `src/shape/transpose.rs` exists
- [ ] The crate exposes `shape` if missing
- [ ] No non transpose shape API is added

## Development Workflow

1. Add the module entry file.
2. Add the transpose implementation file.
3. Wire the module into the crate root if necessary.
4. Run a compile check before behavior work starts.
